title: RENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental deposit and rent assistance. Not suitable for emergencies as the process may take several weeks or more. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as low income Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-2176 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Walk in or call on the first business day of the month to be put on a waitlist -Calls are returned by the Housing Coordinator as quickly as possible to discuss if there are program openings the caller may be eligible for FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Documentation of all sources of income for the last 30 days. This can include employment paystubs, verification of cash payments for employment, SSI, TANF, or other benefit letters, alimony payments, etc. -Notices, letters, or other documentation that shows arrears, late payments, or additional proof of risk of homelessness. -Active ID to verify identification and residency LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97424 (Lane County only), 97426, 97434, and 97451 SITE HOURS: Monday 1:30pm-6pm and Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West on Main Street to N Street, turn right 2 blocks to Birch Street. LTD stop at Main and N Streets (2-minute walk). Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS MATERIAL GOODS - ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING MATERIAL GOODS - BABY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
